title: Language Change - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to check DFU pop up
scenario: Language update fails with popup error when one earbud is disconnected, and reconnecting does not clear the popup until dismissed manually.
steps: Open Device Settings and navigate to the Language tab.
Disconnect one earbud (place it in the charge case).
expected: After tapping 'Ok', the popup is dismissed and the user is returned to Device Settings > Language tab.
